creator: naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
text:
Can't write more than a single archive to tape.

How-To-Repeat: 
# dump 0af /dev/nrsa0 /
...
# dump 0af /dev/nrsa0 /home
...
(sa0:ncr0:0:6:0): WRITE(06). CDB: a 0 0 28 0 0
(sa0:ncr0:0:6:0): ILLEGAL REQUEST
  DUMP: write error 20 blocks into volume 1
  DUMP: Do you want to restart?: ("yes" or "no")
